cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. So we have Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve as the main dancers, each with a partner at the start. Let me note down the initial pairings first. Starting pairings: - Alice is with Sam. - Bob is with Izzi. - Claire is with Jamie. - Dave is with Ophelia. - Eve is with Patrick. Now, the problem says that throughout the song, there are several partner swaps. Let's go through each step one by one and track the changes. First swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. So Bob's partner was Izzi, and Dave's partner was Ophelia. After swapping, Bob will now be with Ophelia, and Dave will be with Izzi. Let me update that.
